title: Story & Heritage
description: Story-songs and heritage-anthems from the partner-artist roster. Allan Hassan's two-album Failure-to-Atone cycle (the album cut and the broadway-stage cut), Gage Darron's American-Anthem heritage record, Gage Darron's self-titled introduction, and Daisy Wylder's debut singer-songwriter set. Folk, Americana, broadway, the long ballad.
theme: Story, heritage, anthem, Americana, folk, ballad

albums.why_included: The album cut of the Failure-to-Atone cycle — conscience-search and the long honest reckoning.
The broadway-stage cut of the same cycle — lifted, theatrical, room-filling.
Flag-and-faith heritage anthem cycle — the long love-letter to the country.
Self-titled introduction — the singer-songwriter at the kitchen table.
Debut singer-songwriter set — warm-acoustic story-song heart-mark.
